mode_of_action_summary: Absorbed through roots and leaves, blocks Photosystem II by binding to D1 protein, stops photosynthesis, causes chlorosis and necrosis leading to weed death.

target_weeds.note: Weak on perennial grasses; tank mix required for complete control.

application_timing.pre_emergence: 0-3 days after sowing on moist soil
application_timing.post_emergence: Weeds at 2-4 leaf stage, crop at 2-6 leaf stage

soil_requirements: Light irrigation after spray improves performance
crop_safety_conditions: Do not apply on stressed crop
Avoid sandy soil at high dose
Do not apply after 6-leaf stage in maize

residual_and_rotation.next_crop: Wheat, vegetables and pulses can be grown after residual breakdown

tank_mix_recommendations: Atrazine + Nicosulfuron for complete grass and broadleaf control
Atrazine + Pendimethalin for strong pre-emergence program
Atrazine + 2,4-D for enhanced broadleaf control (early post)
benefits: Clean field during critical crop growth stage
farmer_problem_triggers_shahmukhi: مکئی وچ شروع توں جڑی بوٹی بہت اے
بوائی توں بعد کھیت صاف رکھنا اے
پہلی گوڈی دا خرچہ بچانا اے
باتھو تے چولائی بہت نکل آندے نیں
گنے وچ لائن وچ جڑی بوٹی کنٹرول کرنی اے
safety: Use PPE during handling and spraying

do_not_recommend_when: Crop is wheat, rice, cotton or vegetables
